manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.

manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Feat: Playoff bracket view redesign — pool stage/bracket sections, live win counts, winner highlight with trophy, loser fade, forfeit support, short date format, status badges.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Fix: embed schedule widget (GameBar and others) now loads correctly in cross-origin iframes — CSP frame-ancestors and X-Frame-Options no longer block /embed.html on third-party sites.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Feat: multi-select league filter in embed code generator — pick any combination of leagues (or all) instead of only one; embed URL uses comma-separated league IDs; all embed types respect the selection.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Feat: standings sort selector — choose sort priority (W, GB, RS, RA, RD) or enable custom drag-and-drop row ordering; default sort can be pre-configured in embed code generator.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Feat: user menu lists all teams from the loaded schedule with color swatch, name and abbreviation; league builder now offers all schedule teams (not just global roster) when adding existing teams to a new league.
